message:
Enhance How It Was Made page with Stripe-level UI polish

- Add EnhancedHero with floating orbs, parallax, and animated counters
- Add EnhancedStats with 3D tilt effects and animated number counters
- Add EnhancedTimeline with search, progress indicator, and message virtualization
- Create useCountUp hook for smooth number animations with easing
- Update page layout with glassmorphism and modern design patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
